title: andropogon neesii subvar. gardneri
intro: Andropogon neesii subvar. gardneri, commonly known as a type of grass, is a plant species that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Andropogon neesii subvar. gardneri is typically used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and poultices, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
